cases.reason: BUGS-doris-generator-mappings-2026-07-13 row 6: a scalar JSON extract now renders for Doris as the WRAPPED form JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(...)) (was bare JSON_EXTRACT, which kept JSON quotes). The Doris canonical `sql` therefore parses back to JSONUnquote(JSONExtractScalar), a two-node shape that does not collapse to a single Postgres JSON_EXTRACT_PATH on the round-trip (Postgres keeps the outer JSON_UNQUOTE). The doris and read directions are correct; only this synthetic doris->postgres re-derivation cannot reconstruct the original single-node form.
